response: Marlina The Murderer In Four Acts is an Indonesian film directed by Mouly Surya. It is set on the island of Sumba, which is part of East Nusa Tenggara province in Indonesia. While principal photography for the movie was done in and around the actual locations in Sumba, some scenes were also shot in nearby islands like Flores.
